summary: Iteration 10: Tested EU colleges fields and weekly digest widget. All 6 features verified via backend API calls and Playwright UI testing.
seed_data_creation: Inserted test user (test-user-iter10) and session (test_session_iter10) into MongoDB for Playwright testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10: All EU college and weekly digest features working. Backend /api/colleges returns 31 EU colleges with region/country/language_of_study/scholarship_type fields. Region filter on /colleges shows Europe option with 31 cards correctly displaying EU-specific fields. /api/dashboard/weekly-digest returns all required fields. Weekly digest widget renders on Dashboard with data-testid='weekly-digest-widget'. Recommended action button navigates to /compose correctly. Auth: use test_session_iter10 token.
verified_features: GET /api/colleges returns 31 EU colleges with region, country, language_of_study, scholarship_type fields - PASS
Region filter on /colleges shows Europe option and filters to 31 EU colleges - PASS
EU college cards show country, language_of_study, scholarship_type - PASS
GET /api/dashboard/weekly-digest returns all required fields - PASS
Weekly digest widget renders with data-testid='weekly-digest-widget' - PASS
digest-recommended-action button clickable and navigates to /compose - PASS
